description: Product Description Brand Description: OLEVS is mainly engaged in mechanical watches, high quality and high performance. OLEVS is dedicated to designing fashion and performance multifunctional watches. Hollow bottom design and roman numerals combine the balance of the steering wheel machine. A small week and calendar dial and a sun and moon replacement window on the top highlight the overall beauty of the watch. An ideal companion for any occasion. Its unique texture makes it easy to spice up a normal outfit. Add style to your life. Lightweight stainless steel case offers a better wearing experience. As you know, this watch is not just a watch, it means a person's sense and charm. In the long river, time exists in all forms and can tell the watch is past directly. We all live in the age of science and technology. Sometimes the watch doesn't work well, but you need to record something, really make our life with the hour and minute hands. OLVES WATCH WILL DO OUR BEST TO MAKE A BEAUTIFUL WATCH. We make every watch with love OLVES means Only Loves. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
